full_text:
Shi Zimiao
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Shi Zimiao. A Taoist. Emperor Shao [Liu Bian] was sent to live with him. Shi Zimiao was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.
